_status: Curated stat overrides, validated against each item's wiki Effects section (Repentance values). tearsMult is a fire-rate multiplier (>1 = faster). damageFlat adds AFTER the sqrt formula but BEFORE multipliers, per the Polyphemus page math: (Damage + 4) x 2.

the-sad-onion.note: Also auto-extracted; kept as a known-good sanity pair for the extractor.

crickets-head.note: Shares a non-stacking x1.5 multiplier slot with Magic Mushroom (see Magic Mushroom Notes).

magic-mushroom.note: Repentance values: +1 heart container, +0.3 damage, x1.5 multiplier (non-stacking with Cricket's Head), +2.5 range, +0.3 speed, full heal, size up.

polyphemus.note: Wiki math: (Damage + 4) x 2; Repentance: tears fired per second x 0.42. Overkill damage pierces to the next enemy.

brimstone.note: Repentance: Fire Rate / 3 — this IS the charge wind-up; beam damage handled by the playground engine.

sulfur.note: Temporary Brimstone for the room; modeled as full Brimstone in the sandbox.

revelation.note: Chargeable holy Brimstone + flight; lighter fire-rate penalty than Brimstone proper.

brittle-bones.note: Grants 6 empty bone hearts, removes red containers. Conditional: +0.4 fire rate (cap-breaking) per bone heart lost — modeled at runtime, not as a flat modifier.

technology-2.note: Repentance: right-eye laser deals 13% of damage 15x/second; tears fired per second x (2/3).

soy-milk.note: Repentance: fire rate x5.5 (15 tears/sec at base, breaking the delay-5 cap), damage x0.2, -0.3 tear size.
